perf.regime: One program per token row: coalesced read of E logits into registers, fp32 online softmax, iterative argmax top-k (TOPK unrolled, BLOCK_E=next_pow2(E)), optional fp32 renorm. Memory-bound on the [M,E] gating read; fuses softmax + topk + renorm into one launch (the reference is two launches + a pointwise). num_warps=4.

notes: Fused sgl_kernel.topk_softmax equivalent. TOPK and BLOCK_E are compiled as tl.constexpr (recompiled per (topk, next_pow2(E)) and cached by Triton) — they are derived from the dispatch args, NOT user specialization_knobs, so specialization_knobs is empty. Portable across NVIDIA sm_80+/AMD cdna3 (no vendor intrinsics; pure tl.exp + tl.argmax). Selection order is descending probability to match the reference's torch.topk(sorted=True) for element-wise verify parity.
